item.title: Digital Camera Undelete Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Undelete Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Undelete Tool
(Utilities)
Digital Camera Undelete program supports major brands including professional camera, digital video camera, novelty camera, point and shoot camera, novelty camera and many more. Picture undelete tool revives deleted picture saved in various file extensions including jpeg, png, wmf, tiff etc. Digital Camera Undelete software offers reliable and cost effective solution to restore deleted data lost due to virus attack, software failure and improper shutdown without any data loss reasons. www.digitalcameraundelete.com restores lost files and folder at user specified location for future usage. Proficient and efficient digital camera data recovery program regains lost or corrupted pictures and photos in an accurate way. Digital Camera Undelete software is finest solution to repair erased priceless photos, video films, photo collection in an easiest way. Inexpensive and easy to use digital camera files retrieval tool has safe and reliable way to regain accidentally deleted valuable images which are saved in any type of file formats. Digital Camera Undelete utility supports major Windows operating system like Windows7, Windows vista, Windows server etc. www.digitalcameraundelete.com provides better solution to repair missing or erased files and folder by click on a single mouse button. Digital camera data recovery application that is used to recover damaged photos without making any modification in the picture originality and gets back the images in same condition. www.digitalcameraundelete.com repairs missing, misplaced or formatted data in an effective manner.Features:-* Digital Camera Undelete utility supports all major brands including Kingston, Sony, Toshiba, Panasonic, LG electronics etc.* Digital camera files retrieval software restores missing photos, video files lost due to virus attack, corrupted media and so on.*Digital camera data recovery tool regains lost data without requiring any prior or technical skills to operate the software.

[read more]

item.title: Blender [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: Blender [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Blender
(3D Graphics)
Free and Open Source Blender is a public project hosted on blender.org, licensed as GNU GPL, owned by its contributors. For that reason Blender is Free and Open Source software, forever. Learn more Part of the industry Blender is a member of ASWF, Khronos, Linux Foundation and OIN.
NOTE: Im not the developer, just the provider.
[read more]

item.title: OBS studio plus [Screen Recorders]
item.itunes:title: OBS studio plus [Screen Recorders]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
OBS studio plus
(Screen Recorders)
OBS Studio is a free and open-source, cross-platform screencasting and streaming app. It is available for Windows, macOS, Linux distributions, and BSD. The OBS Project raises funds on the platforms Open Collective and Patreon.
NOTE: Im not the developer, just the provider.
[read more]

NOTE: Im not the developer, just the provider.

OBS Studio is a free and open-source, cross-platform screencasting and streaming app. It is available for Windows, macOS, Linux distributions, and BSD. The OBS Project raises funds on the platforms Open Collective and Patreon.
NOTE: Im not the developer, just the provider.
[read more]

item.title: GIMP [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: GIMP [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
GIMP
(Graphic Apps)
GNU Image Manipulation Program, commonly known by its acronym GIMP, is a free and open-source raster graphics editor used for image manipulation and image editing, free-form drawing, transcoding between different image file formats, and more specialized tasks. It is extensible by means of plugins, and scriptable. It is not designed to be used for drawing, though some artists and creators have used it in this way.
NOTE: Im not the developer, i just provide the app.
[read more]
item.description:
GIMP
(Graphic Apps)
GNU Image Manipulation Program, commonly known by its acronym GIMP, is a free and open-source raster graphics editor used for image manipulation and image editing, free-form drawing, transcoding between different image file formats, and more specialized tasks. It is extensible by means of plugins, and scriptable. It is not designed to be used for drawing, though some artists and creators have used it in this way.
NOTE: Im not the developer, i just provide the app.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GIMP
(Graphic Apps)
GNU Image Manipulation Program, commonly known by its acronym GIMP, is a free and open-source raster graphics editor used for image manipulation and image editing, free-form drawing, transcoding between different image file formats, and more specialized tasks. It is extensible by means of plugins, and scriptable. It is not designed to be used for drawing, though some artists and creators have used it in this way.
NOTE: Im not the developer, i just provide the app.
[read more]

item.title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[read more]

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. item.title: Software for Employee Scheduling [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Software for Employee Scheduling [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabelmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Software for Employee Scheduling
(Office Apps)
Are you frustrated to manage employee daily attendance records manually? Don't get panic, visit website www.barcodelabelmakersoftware.com to download Software for Staff Scheduling which is helpful for different small to large sized business organizations to manage daily scheduler records like leave maintenance, attendance, in-out details, employee shift records, etc and also provides password protected feature so that unauthorized staff members are not able to modify any confidential records.
[read more]

item.title: Barcode Label Creator Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Barcode Label Creator Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabelcreator
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Label Creator Software
(Office Apps)
Barcode Label Creator Software which is available on www.barcodelabelcreator.org helps user to create different types of barcodes labels of various shapes and designs such as lines, text, rectangle, picture, ellipse, format, pattern, etc. Reliable barcode tags maker tool easily supports wide range of linear and 2D barcode fonts.

item.title: Software Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Software Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Software Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Trained digital data recovery software enables you to get back your unfortunately lost data in a reliable and comfortable atmosphere at your own location instead of going in the search of data recovery specialists. Cool and affordable application is affable with all kind of electronic gadgets used as storage medium such as hard disk, memory card and sticks, USB flash drives and laptops etc and also all their major branded versions like Sony, HP, Seagate, Canon, Nikon etc. As we are aware with the cleanness of real time users of the application so we have tried to give our best in making it user friendly by providing graphical user interface so that any beginner can operate without any expert guidance. Salvaging of lost data and saving at default specified location makes this software different and efficient from others and it is also compatible with Windows OS while other market available programs are mostly command based that are hard to understand and implement. Commercial tool is available in low price in our company website with a 30 days free trial version.Features:* Professional tool for data recovery satisfies you by restoring lost files and folders due to improper power supply, virus attack, emptied recycle bin, manual mistakes and sometimes because of natural calamity. * Intelligent data recovery software has ability to rescue deleted essential information saves in various available storage devices like flash cards, digital cameras, pen drives, laptops, mobile phones and memory cards etc.* Skilled program for efficient data recovery supports almost all file formats like jpeg, mpeg, mpg, gif, doc, txt, html, exe, zip, wmv etc and discover them easily without any problem. * Inexpensive product is based on GUI environment and hence provides the better mechanisms to non-technical people to get back their data with employing fewer efforts.

[read more]
item.description:
Software Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Trained digital data recovery software enables you to get back your unfortunately lost data in a reliable and comfortable atmosphere at your own location instead of going in the search of data recovery specialists. Cool and affordable application is affable with all kind of electronic gadgets used as storage medium such as hard disk, memory card and sticks, USB flash drives and laptops etc and also all their major branded versions like Sony, HP, Seagate, Canon, Nikon etc. As we are aware with the cleanness of real time users of the application so we have tried to give our best in making it user friendly by providing graphical user interface so that any beginner can operate without any expert guidance. Salvaging of lost data and saving at default specified location makes this software different and efficient from others and it is also compatible with Windows OS while other market available programs are mostly command based that are hard to understand and implement. Commercial tool is available in low price in our company website with a 30 days free trial version.Features:* Professional tool for data recovery satisfies you by restoring lost files and folders due to improper power supply, virus attack, emptied recycle bin, manual mistakes and sometimes because of natural calamity. * Intelligent data recovery software has ability to rescue deleted essential information saves in various available storage devices like flash cards, digital cameras, pen drives, laptops, mobile phones and memory cards etc.* Skilled program for efficient data recovery supports almost all file formats like jpeg, mpeg, mpg, gif, doc, txt, html, exe, zip, wmv etc and discover them easily without any problem. * Inexpensive product is based on GUI environment and hence provides the better mechanisms to non-technical people to get back their data with employing fewer efforts.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Software Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Trained digital data recovery software enables you to get back your unfortunately lost data in a reliable and comfortable atmosphere at your own location instead of going in the search of data recovery specialists. Cool and affordable application is affable with all kind of electronic gadgets used as storage medium such as hard disk, memory card and sticks, USB flash drives and laptops etc and also all their major branded versions like Sony, HP, Seagate, Canon, Nikon etc. As we are aware with the cleanness of real time users of the application so we have tried to give our best in making it user friendly by providing graphical user interface so that any beginner can operate without any expert guidance. Salvaging of lost data and saving at default specified location makes this software different and efficient from others and it is also compatible with Windows OS while other market available programs are mostly command based that are hard to understand and implement. Commercial tool is available in low price in our company website with a 30 days free trial version.Features:* Professional tool for data recovery satisfies you by restoring lost files and folders due to improper power supply, virus attack, emptied recycle bin, manual mistakes and sometimes because of natural calamity. * Intelligent data recovery software has ability to rescue deleted essential information saves in various available storage devices like flash cards, digital cameras, pen drives, laptops, mobile phones and memory cards etc.* Skilled program for efficient data recovery supports almost all file formats like jpeg, mpeg, mpg, gif, doc, txt, html, exe, zip, wmv etc and discover them easily without any problem. * Inexpensive product is based on GUI environment and hence provides the better mechanisms to non-technical people to get back their data with employing fewer efforts.

[read more]
